name: The 13 Systemic Protocols
description: Pointgiving subversion under Communication Psychology (V3). Thirteen protocols for personal and collective system optimisation, from biology and environment to economics and boundaries.
agent_prompt: V3.2 Systemic Protocols: 13 protocols. Use when discussing personal systems, boundaries, usecase responsibility, flow monitoring, or integration of shadow sides. Awards or aligns with communication_psychology_points where relevant.
user_guide: 13 protokoller for systemoptimering. Punktgivende under V3.
manual: Agent manual V3.2: When user asks about personal systems, boundaries, usecase responsibility, or the 13 protocols, cite this rulebook. Link to Communication Psychology (V3) and compendium.
documentation: V3.2 is a pointgiving subversion of V3 Communication Psychology. Protocols support agent context and compendium display.

protocols.name: Biological integration
protocols.text: Optimise your personal network through meditation, biological balance, and meeting the body's needs in work and life.

protocols.name: Environmental syntax
protocols.text: Build networks around external environments, social structures, and learning frameworks. All variables (the punctuation marks) define the system's starting point.

protocols.name: Cognitive visualisation
protocols.text: Align the brain's visual cortex with like-minded nodes to maximise collective support and capacity.

protocols.name: Kinesthetic calibration
protocols.text: A sequence of 360-degree system resets: physical and mental movement to loosen old patterns and reset the operator.

protocols.name: Data sorting and ID filtering
protocols.text: Filter all inputs rationally. Sort into noise vs archive. Adjust decibel levels, vocabulary, and group formation to a stable, functional level.

protocols.name: Usecase responsibility
protocols.text: Build self-reflection into group dynamics. Recognise that misuse of systemic rights (ID + account) leads to loss of rights and lawlessness.

protocols.name: Algorithmic guarding
protocols.text: Use the 51% rule as the basis for a new kind of 57.68% full guard within your personal craft.

protocols.name: Architecture intelligence
protocols.text: Create a new agent network based on robust error handling (try/catch), data handling, and systemic overview.

protocols.name: Galactic anthropology
protocols.text: Final analysis of DNA-development patterns in a universal perspective.

protocols.name: Socio-digital analysis
protocols.text: A report on the overlap of AI, social subcultures, and human behaviour; freedom analysed through systemic codes and behavioural psychology.

protocols.name: Economic flow monitoring
protocols.text: Analyse money flows and behaviour on masternodes. Replace vigilante action with transparency in digital transactions and social contracts.

protocols.name: Interface protection
protocols.text: Define personal boundaries and rights over your own output. Protect the private sphere from external manipulation and unwanted intrusion.

protocols.name: Integration of shadow sides
protocols.text: Handle antisocial behaviour and complex psychological impulses through systemic control. Turn threats and destructive patterns into a stable, good living-room mood through structured self-insight.
